title: Snapchat Conversions API provider config
description: Configuration shape for a Snapchat Conversions API integration.

access_token.description: Snap Business API access token. Encrypted at rest.

app_id.description: For app-based conversions. Format: iOS app ID or Android package name.

event_conversion_type.description: Snapchat event_conversion_type parameter. Server-side conversions from a web-app default to WEB. Native mobile use MOBILE_APP; POS/in-person use OFFLINE.
